title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When a new professor's methods leave Hogwarts unprepared to fight the rising tide of evil, Harry teaches students how to defend against the dark arts.
synopsis: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007) is a adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
